productDisplayName: Nike Womens Air Rele Purple Shoe
description: The Air Relentless shoes from nike has been created for serious runners. A great cross-training shoe, its versatile design features nike Air cushioning in the heel to provide ample support and comfort even during strenuous workouts. With an extrenal heel extending to the upper, the Nike Air Relentless is designed to provide absolute lateral stability and support.Upper Open mesh upper with bold pattern for enhanced breathability and style Targeted overlays for lightweight support Interior strap at the midfoot for extra lockdown Reflective swoosh detailing on the sides for enhanced visibility in low-light conditions Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Mesh tongue for greater breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Heel cup for support and snug fit Midsole Full-length Phylon midsole provides lightweight and responsive cushioning Single lasted Phylon forefoot for improved flexibility and cushioning, offering lateral stability Outsole Multi-directional solid rubber outsole for durable performance and traction Air unit in the heel extended to the upper to improve lateral stability and absorb shock on impact, delivering extra cushioning for a smooth ride Waffle pattern at the outsole for traction and added cushioning Exposed flex grooves for enhanced flexibility Wash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
